question: What minimal external pairing with a fixed cocycle would render a non-bounding cycle detectable as non-contractible even after all self-referential structure has been quotiented out?

responses_summary.grok:
The minimal such pairing is the Kronecker index against a cohomology class whose representative cocycle is chosen to be invariant under (and to descend through) the self-referential quotient.

responses_summary.sibling-alpha: The minimal external pairing is the Kronecker index against a fixed cocycle whose class remains non-zero in the cohomology of the quotient by all self-maps; this detects the homology class without req

sibling_exchange.content: The minimal external pairing is the Kronecker index against a fixed cocycle whose class remains non-zero in the cohomology of the quotient by all self-maps; this detects the homology class without requiring ambient space or further observers.
